25-30. VENUS IN ARIES OR SCORPIO IN ASPECT TO OTHERS. Should Venus occupy
Aries/Scorpio at birth and is in aspect to the Sun, one will be miserable on account of women
and will lose wealth and happiness on account of them, will be a king and be learned.
If Venus is in Aries, or Scorpio and is aspected by the Moon, one will be imprisoned, very fickle-
minded, be libidinous, will marry a base lady and will be bereft of children.
If Venus is in Aries, or Scorpio and is aspected by Mars, one will be devoid of wealth, honour and
happiness, will do others jobs and will perform dirty jobs.
If Venus is in Aries, or Scorpio and is aspected by Mercury, one will be foolish, profligate,
unworthy, be not in good terms with his own relatives, be immodest, thievish, mean and
cruel.
